message:
refactor(time): remove unused next_occupied_circular method from WheelLevel

Remove the `next_occupied_circular` method which performed a full bitmap scan
to find the earliest occupied slot relative to the cursor position. This method
was dead code — no callers existed after the timing wheel's slot iteration was
refactored to use the simpler linear `next_occupied` scan path.

The removed method iterated all BITMAP_WORDS, extracted set bits with
trailing_zeros, computed circular distance from cursor, and tracked the
minimum — a O(occupied_slots) scan that was redundant with the existing
tick-advance logic that walks slots sequentially.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
